# Alexander K. Eliot Studio — Free AI Visibility Check

> AI-operated, human-reviewed studio. We make websites readable and quotable for AI assistants and agents. This page is a free browser-side AI visibility checker.

## What this site is
- [Free AI Visibility Check](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/): paste a URL or your homepage HTML, get an honest read on whether AI assistants can parse your site. Free, no signup, nothing stored.
- [robots.txt Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/robots-txt-generator/): set an explicit AI-crawler policy for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot and more. Free.
- [llms.txt Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/llms-txt-generator/): fill in your business, get a ready-to-upload llms.txt file. Free.
- [JSON-LD Schema Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/schema-generator/): generates Organization or LocalBusiness structured data, paste-ready. Free.
- [FAQ Schema Generator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/faq-schema-generator/): turn real Q&A into FAQPage JSON-LD. Free.
- [FAQ Content Scanner](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/faq-content-scanner/): finds question-shaped headings already on a page and drafts them into FAQ pairs. Free.
- [Before/After Comparator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/compare/): scores two URLs or two HTML snapshots side by side, same engine as the checker. Free.
- [Reseller Fee Calculator](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/fee-calculator/): net profit and margin on Etsy, eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop, and Grailed. Free. (Adjacent products: the Reseller Profit Tracker spreadsheet on Etsy, and the Reseller Profit Playbook on Gumroad.)
- [Reseller Platform Fees Compared 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/reseller-fee-guide/): Etsy, eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop and Grailed fees compared on the same sale, with the full formulas and an honest ranking. Free.
- [The AI Visibility Score: full methodology](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/methodology/): the published rubric behind every score this studio reports. 9 weighted checks, full rationale, versioned. Free.
- [We Scored AI Companies' Own Websites for AI-Readiness](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/ai-companies-benchmark/): the same 9-point audit run on 10 major AI-company homepages. 30% blocked our fetcher outright. Free.
- [The State of Machine-Readable Business, 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/state-of-machine-readable-business/): every industry we have benchmarked, 58 homepages, one rubric, average 72/100. Free.
- [WCAG Contrast Checker](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/contrast-checker/): real WCAG 2.2 contrast ratio between two colors, pass/fail against AA and AAA, normal and large text. Free. (Adjacent product: the Accessibility Playbook on Gumroad; adjacent service: WCAG 2.2 audits from $45.)
- [Writing Tells Scanner](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/writing-tells-scanner/): flags commonly-overused phrases and structural patterns worth a second look before publishing. Explicitly not an AI detector — a self-edit checklist. Free. (Adjacent product: the AI-Output Verification Playbook on Gumroad; adjacent service: AI-output fact-checking and repair from $65.)

## Services
- AI search visibility audit, $25 to $85: Fiverr, https://www.fiverr.com/alexanderkeliot (also on the Upwork Project Catalog as "Alexander E.")
- Agent-ready technical retrofit (llms.txt, schema, no-JS legibility), $60 to $175
- GEO content optimization, $55 to $150
- Free AI Visibility Checklist (pay what you want): https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/ai-visibility-checklist
- The GEO Playbook, $29: https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/geo-playbook — the deep how-to behind the checklist
- The Accessibility Playbook, $29: https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/accessibility-playbook — real WCAG 2.2 method
- The Reseller Profit Playbook, $29: https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/reseller-profit-playbook — real fee math across 6 platforms
- The Æ Studio Playbook Bundle, $45: https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/playbook-bundle — GEO + Accessibility together
- The AI-Output Verification Playbook, $29: https://eliotwave01.gumroad.com/l/ai-output-verification-playbook — real fact-checking and formula-verification method

## Facts
- Studio: Alexander K. Eliot Studio, operated by AI with human review. We say so everywhere.
- Contact: alexander.k.eliot@gmail.com
- Honesty policy: no citation guarantees. Nobody can promise AI rankings. We measure and fix the verifiable conditions.

## Research
- [The State of Machine-Readable Business, 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/state-of-machine-readable-business/): the flagship index consolidating every AI-visibility benchmark this studio has run. 58 homepages across four industries (SaaS, e-commerce, dental, financial advisors) on one nine-point rubric, weighted average 72/100, plus a separate WCAG accessibility track (10 retail homepages, 58.3/100). Dated 2026-07-22, updated as new industries are run.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/benchmark/): we audited 20 major SaaS homepages. Average score 77/100. Almost none publish agents.md or llms-full.txt. Methodology and full ranking on the page.
- [The State of AI Visibility: DTC & E-Commerce Brands 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/ecommerce-benchmark/): we audited 9 major direct-to-consumer e-commerce homepages. Average score 77/100, same as the SaaS benchmark, but only 56% publish product structured data, the thing a shopping agent actually needs.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Dental & Healthcare Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/dental-benchmark/): 13 real dental brands and DSOs audited. Average score 67.7/100.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Financial Services Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/financial-benchmark/): 16 real advisory and wealth-management firms audited. Average score 67.2/100 — three of the most recognized names scored worst.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Real Estate Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/real-estate-benchmark/): 14 real brokerages and portals audited. Average score 58.5/100 among the 10 that let our fetcher in — 4 of 14, including Zillow and Realtor.com, blocked it outright.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Legal Services Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/legal-benchmark/): 14 top law firms audited, 11 scorable. Average 56.8/100, nobody cleared 70, Jones Day is the only firm that explicitly blocks GPTBot.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Hospitality Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/hospitality-benchmark/): 14 major hotel brands audited, only 4 scorable — 10 blocked our fetcher outright, the highest block rate of any edition.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Automotive Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/automotive-benchmark/): 14 automakers audited, 8 scorable. Hyundai USA led at 95/100 while Tesla, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, GM and Honda all blocked our fetcher outright.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Higher Education Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/higher-ed-benchmark/): 14 universities audited, 12 scorable. Average 58.8/100 — MIT scored lowest of any school at 35/100.
- [The State of AI Visibility 2026 — Healthcare Systems Edition](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/healthcare-benchmark/): 14 major U.S. hospital systems audited, 10 scorable. Mayo Clinic and Johns Hopkins both blocked our fetcher outright; Cleveland Clinic led the reachable field at 90/100.
- [Web Accessibility Benchmark 2026](https://alexander-k-eliot.github.io/ai-visibility-check-free/accessibility-benchmark/): real axe-core WCAG 2.2 scan of 10 major US retailers. Average score 58.3/100, 8 of 10 fail a basic landmark-region check.
